zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Brandon於1456年出生在英國素福爾可望福德時，他的父親Sir William Brandon32歲，母親Elizabeth Wingfield28歲。他於1475年11月4日與Elizabeth Bruyn在英國英格蘭諾福爾可金也斯 琳結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他在法國被列為standard bearer。他去世於1485年8月22日在英國萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯享年29歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Brandon于1456年出生在英国素福爾可望福德时，他的父亲Sir William Brandon32岁，母亲Elizabeth Wingfield28岁。他于1475年11月4日与Elizabeth Bruyn在英国英格兰諾福爾可金也斯 琳结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他在法国被列为standard bearer。他去世于1485年8月22日在英国萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯享年29岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Brandon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Brandon, in Durham, Norfolk, Suffolk, Warwickshire, and elsewhere. Most are named with Old English brōm ‘broom, gorse’ + dūn ‘hill’. One in Lincolnshire, however, may be named after the Brant River, on which it stands; Ekwall derives the river name from Old English brant ‘steep’, presumably with reference to its steep banks. This surname was known in Ireland early enough to have a Gaelicized form de Breandún.
Irish (Kerry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Breandáin ‘son of Breandán’, a rare Kerry surname from the Latinized form of the name of the local saint, Brendan (Brendanus from Bréanainn).
French: from the Old French oblique case of the personal name Brando, of ancient Germanic origin (see Brand 1).

variants.name: Brand
meanings: English, Scottish, North German, Scandinavian, Dutch, and French (mainly Alsace and Lorraine): from the ancient Germanic personal name Brando, Old Norse Brandr, a short form of various compound names containing the element brand ‘sword’ (a derivative of brinnan ‘to flash’), of which the best known is Hildebrand . There is placename evidence for Brant(a) as an Old English personal name; however, the Middle English personal name Brand was probably introduced to England from Old Norse.
German: variant of   Brandt   1 and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.
Swedish and Danish: ornamental name or nickname from brand ‘fire’.

variants.name: Brandom
meanings: English and Jewish (Sephardic): variant of   Brandon  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Brandon was born in 1456, in Wangford, Suffolk, England, his father, Sir William Brandon, was 32 and his mother, Elizabeth Wingfield, was 28. He married Elizabeth Bruyn on 4 November 1475, in King's Lynn, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. His occupation is listed as standard bearer in France. He died on 22 August 1485, in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 29, and was buried in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Brandon est né en 1456, à Wangford, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Brandon, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Wingfield, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Bruyn le 4 novembre 1475, à King's Lynn, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est standard bearer à France. Il est décédé le 22 août 1485, à Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterré à Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.Bishops Lynn, Norfolk, England: King's Lynn, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Brandon 1456 in Wangford, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Brandon 32 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Wingfield 28. Er hat am 4. November 1475 in King's Lynn, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Bruyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als standard bearer in Frankreich aufgeführt. Er starb am 22. August 1485 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England und wurde in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Brandon è nato il nel 1456 nel Wangford, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Sir William Brandon, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Wingfield, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Bruyn il 4 novembre 1475, nel King's Lynn, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come standard bearer nel Francia. Morì il 22 agosto 1485, nel Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolto a Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Brandonが1456年にイギリススフォルクワングフォードで生まれた時，父Sir William Brandonは32歳，母Elizabeth Wingfieldは28歳であった。1475年11月4日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクキング'ス リンでElizabeth Bruynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。フランスでの職業はstandard bearerと記録されている。彼は1485年8月22日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアマーケト ボスウオルスで29歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアマーケト ボスウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Brandon(이)가 1456년 영국 수폴크 왕퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Brandon(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Wingfield(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1475년 11월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 킨그'스 린에서 Elizabeth Bruyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 프랑스에서 standard bearer이었다. 그는 1485년 8월 22일 영국 레이스스터실르 마크트 보스워스에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 마크트 보스워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Brandon nasceu em 1456, em Wangford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Brandon, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Wingfield, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Bruyn em 4 de novembro de 1475, em King's Lynn, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como standard bearer em França. Ele faleceu em 22 de agosto de 1485, em Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 29 anos, e foi sepultado em Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ro.Bishops Lynn, Norfolk, England: King's Lynn, Norfolk, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Brandon родился в 1456 г. в местности вангфорд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Brandon было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Wingfield, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Bruyn 4 ноября 1475 г. в местности кинг'с линн, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери.  Он работал по профессии standard bearer в местности Франция. Он умер 22 августа 1485 г. в местности маркет босворт, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 29 лет и был похоронен в местности маркет босворт, лисестиршир, Англия.

Se casó con Elizabeth Bruyn el 4 de noviembre de 1475, en King's Lynn, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era standard bearer en Francia. Murió el 22 de agosto de 1485, en Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultado en Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
